summary: Iteration 38 - Phase 2 Features Testing: Chat API, Workload Dashboard, Onboarding Wizard, Document Checklist. All features working correctly. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts pointer events on chat toggle button - requires force=True or JS click to bypass
ui_bugs.workaround: Use JavaScript click or force=True in Playwright

critical_code_review_comments: Chat API ObjectId serialization fix verified - convo.pop('_id', None) and msg.pop('_id', None) working correctly
Chat Widget renders floating button on both Client and Case Manager dashboards
Chat Widget shows conversation list with unread count badges
Chat messages display correctly with sender name, role, timestamp, and read status indicators
Cross-role chat working - Client sends message, Case Manager can see and reply
Onboarding Wizard shows 5-step wizard (Welcome, Profile, Info Sheet, Documents, AI Tips)
Onboarding Wizard displays case info (LEAMSS-2024-0001, Canada PR) and user name
Onboarding Wizard Skip button works and remembers preference via localStorage
Document Checklist renders step-wise document progress with status tracking
Document Checklist shows required documents per workflow step (Passport, Photo as 'Pending Upload')
Workload Dashboard shows stats cards: Active Cases (8), Pending Reviews (14), Expiring Docs (0), Awaiting Client (4), Steps In Progress (2)
Workload Dashboard Priority Tasks section shows 18 tasks with document reviews
All 4 login roles work: Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested Phase 2 features. ALL PASSED: (1) Chat API - create conversation, send message, get messages, unread count, cross-role chat all work, (2) Workload Dashboard - stats cards, priority tasks, case distribution all work, (3) Onboarding Wizard - 5-step wizard with skip functionality works, (4) Document Checklist - step-wise document progress with status tracking works, (5) All 4 dashboard roles work with no regressions. Note: Chat widget floating button has minor overlay issue with Emergent badge but works with JS click.

chat_api.cross_role_chat: PASS - Client message visible to Manager

workload_dashboard.stats_cards: PASS - Active Cases, Pending Reviews, Expiring Docs, Awaiting Client, Steps In Progress
workload_dashboard.priority_tasks: PASS - Shows 18 tasks with priority badges

document_checklist.required_documents: PASS - Passport, Photo shown as 'Pending Upload'
document_checklist.status_badges: PASS - Required badge, Pending Upload badge

chat_widget_frontend.message_view: PASS - Shows sender name, role, timestamp, read status

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - Resend API falls back to in-app mock logging (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
